name: Abergavenny Castle Meadows
dog_lead_policy: Off-lead in meadow; on lead in town
highlights: Flat riverside stroll with castle views — ideal after a day in the hills.
points_of_interest: Abergavenny Castle (Cadw); Linda Vista ornamental gardens; Tithe Barn
viewpoints: River Usk; Blorenge and Sugar Loaf
picnic_spots: Castle Meadows grass; benches along Usk
food_drink_nearby: The Angel Hotel; The Hen & Chicks; The Kings Arms; Hamiltons deli
hazards_notes: Floods after heavy rain; popular with joggers
